narrative:
DRIVER
USD leads D1+H4 CSM at 100 in a Risk-Off High regime, driven by VIX spiking 11.7%, US 10Y yields surging 213bps to 4.556%, and copper collapsing 4.4% signalling real demand destruction. USDCHF is the cleanest expression with D1+H4 strong buy and H4 momentum at 74, reinforced by the -0.87 EURUSD-USDCHF inverse correlation cluster, while USDCAD confirms with H4 strong buy at momentum 70. AUD H4 CSM at 26 versus D1 at 65 is the critical divergence flag: AUDUSD is fading intraday hard despite daily trend, making AUDUSD shorts the highest-conviction fade.

MOMENTUM
Gaining: USDCAD CMP 60, D1 rising strongly, H4 70 confirming USD buy
Fading: EURUSD CMP 40, H4 momentum collapsed to 18. GBPUSD CMP 40, H4 at 20 with D1 decelerating. GBPJPY CMP 39, both timeframes fading

WATCH
Copper extends below 6.20 on USDCAD, triggering CAD further deterioration and accelerating the H4 strong buy setup
US 10Y yields break above 4.65 on USDJPY, negating yen intervention threat and extending the H4 buy signal at momentum 77
Silver stabilises above 78.00 on AUDUSD, undermining the AUD fade and invalidating the D1/H4 divergence short thesis

themes.theme: US Dollar strength driven by higher yields and resilient economic data
Risk-off sentiment supporting safe-haven assets and USD
Emerging market currencies weakening against USD
Commodity weakness amid trade uncertainty and tariff concerns
Euro struggling to capitalize on global momentum
Japanese Yen intervention constraints limiting upside
Commodity prices volatile on Trump-China trade developments

key_observation: US Dollar rallying strongly on dual drivers of elevated Treasury yields and better-than-expected economic data. NY Fed manufacturing index surged to 19.6 vs 7.5 forecast, signaling economic resilience. Concurrent risk-off environment bolsters USD safe-haven appeal. EM currencies under pressure with INR hitting all-time lows. Commodity-linked currencies CAD, AUD, NZD weakening sharply.
watch: Treasury yield trajectory critical for USD momentum. Trump-China trade negotiations and tariff implementation timing. Iran nuclear deal developments. Fed policy signals. EM currency stability, particularly INR. Commodity prices linked to trade policy clarity.
